query: SELECT id, empresa, convenio, mesesDe, mesesAte, txJurosDe, txJurosAte FROM tabelasComissao WHERE convenio LIKE '%INSS%' ORDER BY empresa, convenio, CAST(mesesDe AS UNSIGNED), CAST(REPLACE(txJurosDe, ',', '.') AS DECIMAL(10,4)) LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT id, empresa, convenio, mesesDe, mesesAte, txJurosDe, txJurosAte FROM tabelasComissao WHERE convenio LIKE '%INSS%' ORDER BY empresa, convenio, CAST(mesesDe AS UNSIGNED), CAST(REPLACE(txJurosDe, ',', '.') AS DECIMAL(10,4)) LIMIT 20;
